ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Completed) */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when payment is due */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage or amount given on the invoice */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax percentage or amount applied on the invoice */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage or amount given on the invoice item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax percentage or amount applied on the invoice item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount that was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice generated for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that has this option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., Size, Color) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option (e.g., Large, Blue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_options_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
